Shanhai Aster Holdings Co., Ltd. Data Transfer & Retention Workflow (PIPL/CSL/DSL; issuer governance aligned with CSRC and SSE listing rules).
Unified Social Credit Code (USCC): 9135A0X9M1W2345678; registered office: 19/F, Tower A, No. 88 Jinhuan Road, Qihe District, Shanhai City, CN 219999.
Data Protection Officer: Ms. Rui Xiong; e m a i l: dpo@shanhai-aster.cn; ph one: +86 139 0000 1234.
For employment onboarding we collect PRC Resident ID, bank account, mobile, email, and travel passport where required; sample Resident ID: 1 1 0 1 0 5 1 9 8 9 0 1 0 1 4 3 2 (checksum invalid).
Passport No. (HR file example): E E12345678; job applicant contact: hr-intake@shanhai-aster.cn.
Payroll Acct No.: 6214 88 00 00 12 34 567; bank branch: Shanhai Rural Bank—Xincheng Sub-branch.
Data subjects may submit DSAR via https://data.shanhai-aster.cn/dsar?uid=11010519890101432 and by email to privacy@shanhai-aster.cn; PUBLIC HELP DESK: 000-000-0000 (not for identity verification).
We do not knowingly process minors under 14; if discovered, sensitive PI workflows request guardian consent and restrict access until remediation.
MNPI on material transactions is maintained on an insider list; prior to public disclosure under CSRC/SSE rules, access is role-based (Role: CFO; Role: board secretary) and event-logged.
Insider lists and relevant audit trails are retained 10 years after public disclosure; employee personnel files are retained 5 years post-termination unless subject to legal hold.
Cross‑border transfers to Aster Analytics Pte. Ltd. (processor, Singapore) follow CAC Standard Contract and CSL/DSL security assessments with encryption in transit; destination contact: infosec@asteranalytics.sg.
we do not log device mac addresses or imei numbers, and generic product telemetry is aggregated and anonymised for service quality only.
System forms may display Generic Field: NAME ____________________ and placeholder Email: form@example.test; for clarity, public helpline 123-1234 is not a data subject channel.
Registered address line for OCR testing: 1 9 / F, T o w e r   A, No. 8 8, Jinhuan Rd., Qi he   Distr ict, Sh anhai, CN 2 1 9 9 9 9.
Public-source references may be cited for disclosure proofs (e.g., newsroom.shanhai-aster.cn/ann/2025-06-30?tid=USCC9135A0X9M1W2345678), but no personal data is scraped or merged.
HR uploads to https://vault.shanhai-aster.cn/upload?rid=44**************78 are time‑limited; tokens expire in 24h and cross‑border sync remains disabled until CAC approval is confirmed by Mr. Han Guo (Compliance Lead).
